question: I mentioned an investment for a competition four weeks ago? What did I buy?
ground_truth_answer: I got my own set of sculpting tools.

retrieval_results.context: User has been attending sculpting classes at a local art studio every Saturday morning from 10 am to 1 pm for about six weeks, enjoying the experience and experimenting with different materials and techniques.
